# .github Overview

This directory contains repository automation and policy files for CI, static analysis, and release hygiene.
Use the structure notes below to find the right file or subfolder quickly.

## Structure
- `workflows/`: GitHub Actions workflows that build, test, fuzz, publish reports, and smoke-check deployments.
- `OVERVIEW.md`: This guide documents the folder structure and explains what the checked-in files and subfolders are for.
- `zizmor.yml`: Configuration for the GitHub Actions static-analysis policy checks run by Zizmor.
